Arn.markdownDescription:
Unique offering ARN, e.g. 'arn:aws:medialive:us-west-2:123456789012:offering:87654321'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

OfferingId.markdownDescription:
Unique offering ID, e.g. '87654321'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CurrencyCode.description: Currency code for usagePrice and fixedPrice in ISO-4217 format, e.g. 'USD'
CurrencyCode.markdownDescription:
Currency code for usagePrice and fixedPrice in ISO-4217 format, e.g. 'USD'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Duration.markdownDescription:
Lease duration, e.g. '12'

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

DurationUnits.markdownDescription:
Units for duration, e.g. 'MONTHS'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MONTHS  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

FixedPrice.description: One-time charge for each reserved resource, e.g. '0.0' for a NO_UPFRONT offering
FixedPrice.markdownDescription:
One-time charge for each reserved resource, e.g. '0.0' for a NO_UPFRONT offering

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

OfferingDescription.description: Offering description, e.g. 'HD AVC output at 10-20 Mbps, 30 fps, and standard VQ in US West (Oregon)'
OfferingDescription.markdownDescription:
Offering description, e.g. 'HD AVC output at 10-20 Mbps, 30 fps, and standard VQ in US West (Oregon)'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

OfferingType.markdownDescription:
Offering type, e.g. 'NO_UPFRONT'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: NO_UPFRONT  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Region.markdownDescription:
AWS region, e.g. 'us-west-2'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UsagePrice.description: Recurring usage charge for each reserved resource, e.g. '157.0'
UsagePrice.markdownDescription:
Recurring usage charge for each reserved resource, e.g. '157.0'

---

Required: No  
Type: Number  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ChannelClass.markdownDescription:
Channel class, e.g. 'STANDARD'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: STANDARD | SINGLE_PIPELINE  
Update requires: No interruption

Codec.markdownDescription:
Codec, e.g. 'AVC'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MPEG2 | AVC | HEVC | AUDIO | LINK | AV1  
Update requires: No interruption

MaximumBitrate.markdownDescription:
Maximum bitrate, e.g. 'MAX_20_MBPS'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MAX_10_MBPS | MAX_20_MBPS | MAX_50_MBPS  
Update requires: No interruption

MaximumFramerate.markdownDescription:
Maximum framerate, e.g. 'MAX_30_FPS' (Outputs only)

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: MAX_30_FPS | MAX_60_FPS  
Update requires: No interruption

Resolution.markdownDescription:
Resolution, e.g. 'HD'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: SD | HD | FHD | UHD  
Update requires: No interruption

ResourceType.markdownDescription:
Resource type, 'INPUT', 'OUTPUT', 'MULTIPLEX', or 'CHANNEL'

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: INPUT | OUTPUT | MULTIPLEX | CHANNEL  
Update requires: No interruption

SpecialFeature.markdownDescription:
Special feature, e.g. 'AUDIO_NORMALIZATION' (Channels only)

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ADVANCED_AUDIO | AUDIO_NORMALIZATION | MGHD | MGUHD  
Update requires: No interruption

VideoQuality.markdownDescription:
Video quality, e.g. 'STANDARD' (Outputs only)

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: STANDARD | ENHANCED | PREMIUM  
Update requires: No interruption

ReservationResourceSpecification.markdownDescription:
Resource configuration (codec, resolution, bitrate, ...)

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption
